title: Opening for Production Engineer at ABB India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at ABB India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? ABB India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!
